chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-672 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 09-08-2023 Mr. Akhtar Ali Abro advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General. ***** The petitioner sought adjustment of the service that he rendered on contract basis. He now seeks his appointment with inclusion of the service that he rendered as above including nine years’ experience for his seniority to be maintained. This indulgence for accommodating the petitioner who was appointed as above cannot be continued as this would flout the process of regular appointments whatever grade it may be. In view of the above such adjustment is not permissible and the request of the petitioner is declined. Accordingly, the petition stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
